name: JTEC Corporation
summary: JTEC Corporation engages in technical intellectual property leasing business in Japan and internationally. It offers machinery design and development, electrical and electronic design and development, and employment placement services. The company also engages in the software development, including embedded system software, packaged software, open system, smartphone application, general-purpose machine system, cloud system, communication network, and Web system. In addition, it is involved in the development of integrated core system for business management; Web application development; and Web site construction and other activities. Further, the company offers various technical, technical training, and consulting services. JTEC Corporation was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
